title: selaginella ornata
intro: Selaginella ornata, also known as Spikemoss or Polypody, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its delicate, feathery fronds. Traditionally, Selaginella ornata has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting skin health. In herbal preparations, Selaginella ornata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
